building_blocks.name: pipeline-assistant-foundry
building_blocks.purpose: Customer-safe assistant for explaining pipeline execution status and outcomes.

building_blocks.name: portal-api-functions
building_blocks.purpose: Backend API layer providing customer-safe access to Document AI pipeline status, artifacts, and costs.

inputs.name: authenticated_customer_request
inputs.description: Incoming HTTPS request from the portal, typically authenticated via SWA or EasyAuth.

inputs.name: customer_id
inputs.description: The unique identifier of the customer extracted from the authenticated context.

outputs.name: pipeline_run_summary
outputs.description: A list of summarized pipeline runs for the customer.

outputs.name: pipeline_run_detail
outputs.description: Full details and step timeline for a specific pipeline run.

outputs.name: artifact_metadata
outputs.description: Metadata for customer-visible artifacts.

outputs.name: cost_summary
outputs.description: Aggregated estimated cost for a specific run.

outputs.name: friendly_errors
outputs.description: Non-technical error messages and correlation IDs.

building_blocks.name: blob-artifact-store
building_blocks.purpose: Store input, intermediate, and output artifacts for pipeline executions with hardened validation and secure artifact delivery.

inputs.name: artifact_content
inputs.description: Raw binary content of the artifact to store. Must be bytes.

inputs.name: artifact_metadata
inputs.description: Dictionary of metadata including kind, safe_name, content_type, and is_customer_visible.

inputs.name: ARTIFACT_STORE_BLOB_ENDPOINT
inputs.description: Primary blob service endpoint (environment variable). Must be a valid HTTPS Azure Blob Storage URL.

inputs.name: ARTIFACT_CONTAINER_NAME
inputs.description: Name of the blob container (environment variable). Follows Azure naming rules.

inputs.name: ARTIFACT_MAX_SIZE_BYTES
inputs.description: Maximum allowed artifact size (environment variable). Default 100MB.

inputs.name: SAS_MAX_LIFETIME_HOURS
inputs.description: Maximum lifetime for generated SAS tokens (in hours). Cap is 48 hours.

inputs.name: runtime_principal_id
inputs.description: The principal ID of the runtime managed identity (Terraform variable) to grant 'Storage Blob Data Owner' access.

inputs.name: allowed_ips
inputs.description: Required list of public IP addresses or CIDR blocks allowed to access the storage account. At least one entry must be provided to ensure a usable network path when public access is restricted. Private endpoints are not supported.

outputs.name: artifact_reference
outputs.description: A customer-safe Artifact reference conforming to artifact.schema.json.

outputs.name: signed_read_url
outputs.description: Short-lived, read-only, user-delegation SAS URL for the artifact.

building_blocks.name: static-status-portal
building_blocks.purpose: Minimal read-only status portal shell for displaying customer-safe pipeline outcomes.

inputs.name: name_prefix
inputs.description: A prefix for the name of the Static Web App.

inputs.name: resource_group_name
inputs.description: The name of the resource group in which to create the Static Web App.

inputs.name: location
inputs.description: The Azure region where the Static Web App should be created.

inputs.name: sku_tier
inputs.description: The SKU tier of the Static Web App (Free or Standard).

inputs.name: sku_size
inputs.description: The SKU size of the Static Web App (Free or Standard).

inputs.name: tags
inputs.description: A mapping of tags to assign to the resource.

outputs.name: static_web_app_id
outputs.description: The ID of the Static Web App.

outputs.name: static_web_app_name
outputs.description: The name of the Static Web App.

outputs.name: static_web_app_default_host_name
outputs.description: The default host name of the Static Web App.

outputs.name: resource_group_name
outputs.description: The name of the resource group.

building_blocks.name: azure-pipelines-azure-deploy
building_blocks.purpose: Secure Azure Pipelines deployment reference patterns for Azure services (SWA, Durable Pipelines, Web App Agent API) using Workload Identity Federation.

inputs.name: AZURE_SERVICE_CONNECTION_NAME
inputs.description: Name of the Azure Resource Manager service connection configured with Workload Identity Federation.

inputs.name: AZURE_TENANT_ID
inputs.description: Tenant ID of the Azure tenant (used for Terraform).

inputs.name: ENVIRONMENT_NAME
inputs.description: The name of the Azure Pipelines Environment for deployment gating and approvals.

inputs.name: BACKEND_RESOURCE_GROUP_NAME
inputs.description: The resource group name for the Terraform remote backend.

inputs.name: BACKEND_STORAGE_ACCOUNT_NAME
inputs.description: The storage account name for the Terraform remote backend.

inputs.name: BACKEND_CONTAINER_NAME
inputs.description: The container name for the Terraform remote backend.

inputs.name: BACKEND_KEY
inputs.description: The state file key for the Terraform remote backend.

inputs.name: AZURE_RESOURCE_GROUP_NAME
inputs.description: Resource group name (used for SWA).

inputs.name: AZURE_STATIC_WEB_APP_NAME
inputs.description: Name of the Azure Static Web App resource.

inputs.name: LOCATION
inputs.description: Azure region for deployment.

inputs.name: RESOURCE_PREFIX
inputs.description: Prefix for resources (Web App Agent API).

inputs.name: CONTAINER_IMAGE
inputs.description: The container image to deploy (Web App Agent API).

inputs.name: CONTAINER_REGISTRY_SERVER
inputs.description: The FQDN of the container registry (Web App Agent API).

inputs.name: CONTAINER_REGISTRY_ID
inputs.description: The ID of the Azure Container Registry (Web App Agent API).

inputs.name: AUTH_CLIENT_ID
inputs.description: The Client ID for Entra ID authentication (Web App Agent API).

outputs.name: webapp_api_endpoint
outputs.description: The default hostname of the deployed Web App Agent API.

building_blocks.name: github-actions-azure-deploy
building_blocks.purpose: Secure GitHub Actions deployment reference patterns for Azure services (SWA, APIM AI Gateway, Web App Agent API) using OIDC and federated identity.

inputs.name: AZURE_CLIENT_ID
inputs.description: Client ID of the Microsoft Entra application or User-Assigned Managed Identity for OIDC authentication.

inputs.name: AZURE_TENANT_ID
inputs.description: Tenant ID of the Azure tenant.

inputs.name: AZURE_SUBSCRIPTION_ID
inputs.description: Subscription ID of the target Azure subscription.

inputs.name: AZURE_STATIC_WEB_APPS_API_TOKEN
inputs.description: Deployment token for Azure Static Web Apps. Used when OIDC is not exclusively used for the SWA upload action.

inputs.name: ENVIRONMENT_NAME
inputs.description: The name of the GitHub Environment for deployment gating and approvals.

inputs.name: BACKEND_RESOURCE_GROUP_NAME
inputs.description: The resource group name for the Terraform remote backend.

inputs.name: BACKEND_STORAGE_ACCOUNT_NAME
inputs.description: The storage account name for the Terraform remote backend.

inputs.name: BACKEND_CONTAINER_NAME
inputs.description: The container name for the Terraform remote backend.

inputs.name: BACKEND_KEY
inputs.description: The state file key for the Terraform remote backend.

inputs.name: RESOURCE_GROUP_NAME
inputs.description: The name of the target Azure resource group (APIM).

inputs.name: LOCATION
inputs.description: Azure region for deployment.

inputs.name: APIM_NAME
inputs.description: Name of the APIM instance.

inputs.name: RESOURCE_PREFIX
inputs.description: Prefix for resources (Web App Agent API).

inputs.name: CONTAINER_IMAGE
inputs.description: The container image to deploy (Web App Agent API).

inputs.name: CONTAINER_REGISTRY_SERVER
inputs.description: The FQDN of the container registry (Web App Agent API).

inputs.name: CONTAINER_REGISTRY_ID
inputs.description: The ID of the Azure Container Registry (Web App Agent API).

inputs.name: AUTH_CLIENT_ID
inputs.description: The Client ID for Entra ID authentication (Web App Agent API).

outputs.name: static_web_app_url
outputs.description: The URL of the deployed Static Web App.

outputs.name: gateway_url
outputs.description: The base URL of the deployed AI Gateway.

outputs.name: webapp_api_endpoint
outputs.description: The default hostname of the deployed Web App Agent API.

building_blocks.name: field-validation-worker
building_blocks.purpose: Validate extracted fields against business rules and confidence thresholds after OCR.

inputs.name: run_id
inputs.description: The unique identifier for the pipeline run.

inputs.name: artifact_id
inputs.description: The ID of the OCR result artifact to validate.

inputs.name: ruleset_id
inputs.description: Optional identifier for the business ruleset to apply.

outputs.name: validation_status
outputs.description: The outcome of the validation (e.g., 'valid', 'invalid', 'warning').

outputs.name: missing_fields
outputs.description: List of required fields that were not found.

outputs.name: invalid_fields
outputs.description: List of fields that failed business rule validation.

outputs.name: artifacts
outputs.description: List of new artifact IDs generated (e.g., validation report).

building_blocks.name: final-result-publisher
building_blocks.purpose: Finalizes the document processing pipeline by marking artifacts as customer-visible and updating the final run status.

inputs.name: run_id
inputs.description: The unique identifier for the pipeline run.

inputs.name: correlation_id
inputs.description: Optional opaque identifier for customer-side tracking.

inputs.name: validation_status
inputs.description: The outcome of the previous validation step (e.g., 'valid', 'warning').

inputs.name: artifact_ids
inputs.description: List of artifact IDs to be published to the customer portal.

outputs.name: publication_status
outputs.description: The outcome of the publication process (e.g., 'published', 'failed').

building_blocks.name: ocr-document-intelligence
building_blocks.purpose: Extract text and structured fields from documents using Azure AI Document Intelligence.

inputs.name: run_id
inputs.description: The unique identifier for the pipeline run.

inputs.name: artifact_id
inputs.description: The ID of the document artifact to process.

inputs.name: document_type
inputs.description: Optional hint or model ID for Document Intelligence (e.g., 'prebuilt-invoice', 'prebuilt-layout').

outputs.name: extracted_text
outputs.description: The raw text content extracted from the document.

outputs.name: fields
outputs.description: Structured key-value pairs (e.g., from prebuilt models).

outputs.name: confidence
outputs.description: Average confidence score for the extraction (0.0 to 1.0).

outputs.name: artifacts
outputs.description: List of new artifact IDs generated (e.g., OCR JSON, searchable PDF).

resource_id.description: The unique identifier for the resource.

resource_type.description: The type of the resource (virtual_machine, storage_account, database).

building_blocks.name: agent-tool-queue-function
building_blocks.purpose: Async queue-backed Azure Function reference with explicit submit/status contracts for longer-running agent tool execution.

inputs.name: operation_type
inputs.description: The type of operation to perform (e.g., 'ping', 'analyze_text').

inputs.name: parameters
inputs.description: Operation-specific parameters.

outputs.name: correlation_id
outputs.description: Opaque identifier for tracking job progress.

outputs.name: status
outputs.description: Current business-level status (queued, running, succeeded, failed).

building_blocks.name: container-agent-api
building_blocks.purpose: Reference for packaging an agent-facing API as a container for Azure Container Apps or App Service.

inputs.name: container_image
inputs.description: The container image URI to deploy.

inputs.name: listen_port
inputs.description: The port the container listens on (default 80 or 8080).

outputs.name: api_endpoint
outputs.description: The public or internal URL of the hosted API.

building_blocks.name: web-app-agent-api
building_blocks.purpose: Reference for hosting the containerized agent API on Azure App Service.

inputs.name: container_image
inputs.description: The container image URI to deploy.

inputs.name: use_managed_identity_for_registry
inputs.description: Whether to use the system-assigned identity to pull the container image (set to true for private ACR).

inputs.name: listen_port
inputs.description: The port the container listens on (default 80 or 8080).

inputs.name: sku_name
inputs.description: The SKU name for the App Service Plan (default B1).

outputs.name: webapp_name
outputs.description: The name of the deployed web app.

outputs.name: resource_group_name
outputs.description: The name of the resource group.

outputs.name: api_endpoint
outputs.description: The public URL of the hosted API.

outputs.name: principal_id
outputs.description: The principal ID of the system-assigned managed identity.

building_blocks.name: webapp-agent-api
building_blocks.purpose: Reference for Azure App Service/Web App hosting of an agent-facing API.

inputs.name: container_image
inputs.description: The container image URI to deploy.

inputs.name: container_registry_server
inputs.description: The FQDN of the container registry.

inputs.name: container_registry_id
inputs.description: The ID of the Azure Container Registry to grant AcrPull permissions.

inputs.name: client_id
inputs.description: The Client ID for Microsoft Entra ID authentication (EasyAuth).

inputs.name: tenant_id
inputs.description: The Tenant ID for Microsoft Entra ID authentication (EasyAuth).

outputs.name: api_endpoint
outputs.description: The public FQDN of the hosted Web App.

building_blocks.name: entra-external-id-auth
building_blocks.purpose: Customer identity and authorization pattern for external pipeline portals.

building_blocks.name: managed-identity-rbac
building_blocks.purpose: Reference pattern for least-privilege identity and RBAC in Azure.

inputs.name: workload_name
inputs.description: Name of the workload for identity naming.

inputs.name: location
inputs.description: Azure region for the identity.

inputs.name: resource_group_name
inputs.description: Resource group where the identity will be created.

inputs.name: target_resource_id
inputs.description: The fully qualified Azure Resource ID of the target resource for RBAC assignment.

inputs.name: role_definition_name
inputs.description: The name of the built-in Azure RBAC role to assign (e.g., 'Storage Blob Data Reader').

inputs.name: tags
inputs.description: Tags to apply to resources.

outputs.name: identity_principal_id
outputs.description: The Principal ID of the created Managed Identity.

outputs.name: identity_client_id
outputs.description: The Client ID of the created User-Assigned Managed Identity.

outputs.name: role_assignment_id
outputs.description: The ID of the created Role Assignment.

building_blocks.name: azure-functions-mcp-endpoint
building_blocks.purpose: Reference implementation for hosting Model Context Protocol (MCP) servers on Azure Functions using the MCP binding extension.

inputs.name: prefix
inputs.description: Prefix for naming resources.

inputs.name: location
inputs.description: Azure region for deployment.

inputs.name: resource_group_name
inputs.description: Optional: Existing resource group name.

outputs.name: mcp_endpoint_url
outputs.description: The full URL for the MCP Streamable HTTP endpoint.

building_blocks.name: devops-mcp-tool-contract
building_blocks.purpose: Safe read-only DevOps status tool contracts for AI agents.

building_blocks.name: devops-status-adapter
building_blocks.purpose: Controlled read-only Azure DevOps adapter for the MCP tool contract.

inputs.name: organization_url
inputs.description: Azure DevOps organization URL.

inputs.name: project
inputs.description: Azure DevOps project name or ID.

inputs.name: token
inputs.description: Azure DevOps Personal Access Token (PAT).

building_blocks.name: fastmcp-basic-server
building_blocks.purpose: Minimal local MCP server reference using FastMCP to demonstrate the protocol boundary.

outputs.name: api_endpoint
outputs.description: Standardized output name for hosting blocks, set to 'local' for this reference.

building_blocks.name: agent-evaluation-observability
building_blocks.purpose: Tracing, evaluation, and monitoring expectations for customer-safe agent flows.

inputs.name: telemetry_redaction_rules
inputs.description: Explicit rules for what may and must not be traced.

outputs.name: evaluation_checklist
outputs.description: Core quality and safety pillars for agent verification.

outputs.name: trace_event_schema
outputs.description: JSON schema for allowlisted technical telemetry.

outputs.name: evaluation_result_schema
outputs.description: JSON schema for deterministic evaluation results.

outputs.name: trace_checklist
outputs.description: Required technical telemetry fields for diagnostics.

building_blocks.name: appinsights-observability
building_blocks.purpose: Technical telemetry for Azure AI pipeline services with safe boundary enforcement.

building_blocks.name: cost-ledger-capture
building_blocks.purpose: Capture estimated internal cost entries for pipeline steps without exposing technical billing internals.

inputs.name: run_id
inputs.description: Unique identifier for the pipeline run.

inputs.name: category
inputs.description: Cost category (e.g., ai_tokens, storage, function_execution).

inputs.name: estimated_amount
inputs.description: The estimated cost amount.

inputs.name: step_name
inputs.description: Name of the pipeline step.

inputs.name: provider
inputs.description: Service provider (e.g., Azure).

inputs.name: model_or_service
inputs.description: Specific model or service used.

inputs.name: input_units
inputs.description: Number of input units.

inputs.name: output_units
inputs.description: Number of output units.

inputs.name: unit_name
inputs.description: Name of the unit (e.g., token).

inputs.name: currency
inputs.description: Currency code (Supported: USD).

inputs.name: created_at
inputs.description: Timestamp of the cost event (ISO-8601).

outputs.name: ledger_entry
outputs.description: The recorded cost ledger entry conforming to cost-ledger.schema.json.

building_blocks.name: blob-trigger-start-pipeline
building_blocks.purpose: Start a Document AI pipeline execution from a Blob Storage upload.

inputs.name: blob_created_event
inputs.description: Azure Storage blob created event (Event Grid or polling).

inputs.name: customer_metadata
inputs.description: Extracted customer_id and document_type from blob metadata or path.

outputs.name: pipeline_start_request
outputs.description: Normalized request to start a Durable Functions orchestration.

building_blocks.name: durable-basic-pipeline
building_blocks.purpose: Minimal Durable Functions orchestration pattern for customer-visible pipeline status tracking.

inputs.name: pipeline_run
inputs.description: Metadata about the pipeline run (id, customer_id, pipeline_type).

inputs.name: source_blob
inputs.description: Path or reference to the source document in blob storage.

outputs.name: pipeline_run_status
outputs.description: Customer-safe status of the overall pipeline run.

outputs.name: pipeline_step_status
outputs.description: Customer-safe status of individual pipeline steps.

outputs.name: api_endpoint
outputs.description: The endpoint of the deployed Function App.

building_blocks.name: customer-safe-status-boundary
building_blocks.purpose: Defines the boundary between internal technical telemetry and customer-safe business status for agents, pipelines, and portals.

building_blocks.name: key-vault-secret-handling
building_blocks.purpose: Reference guidance for secure Key Vault secret handling using Managed Identity and secret references.

building_blocks.name: apim-ai-gateway
building_blocks.purpose: Minimal APIM-based AI Gateway for controlled model access.

inputs.name: apim_name
inputs.description: Name of the APIM instance.

inputs.name: location
inputs.description: Azure region for deployment.

inputs.name: model_endpoint
inputs.description: Existing model endpoint URL (e.g., https://resourcename.openai.azure.com/).

inputs.name: model_resource_id
inputs.description: Azure Resource ID of the model for RBAC assignment.

inputs.name: model_id
inputs.description: Friendly identifier for the model (e.g., 'gpt-4o').

inputs.name: token_limit_per_minute
inputs.description: TPM limit to enforce.

inputs.name: max_request_size_bytes
inputs.description: Maximum allowed request body size in bytes.

inputs.name: resource_group_name
inputs.description: The name of the existing resource group.

inputs.name: apim_sku
inputs.description: APIM SKU (Standard v2 recommended for GenAI capabilities).

inputs.name: publisher_email
inputs.description: Email address for APIM notifications.

inputs.name: publisher_name
inputs.description: Organization name for APIM.

inputs.name: tenant_id
inputs.description: Azure AD Tenant ID for JWT validation.

inputs.name: audience
inputs.description: Expected audience for the Entra ID token.

inputs.name: app_insights_instrumentation_key
inputs.description: Application Insights instrumentation key for metrics (optional).

inputs.name: app_insights_resource_id
inputs.description: Application Insights resource ID for logging (optional).

outputs.name: gateway_url
outputs.description: The base URL of the AI Gateway.

outputs.name: api_path
outputs.description: The path for the model API.

outputs.name: identity_principal_id
outputs.description: The Principal ID of the APIM identity.

outputs.name: identity_client_id
outputs.description: The Client ID of the APIM identity.

building_blocks.name: network-boundary-notes
building_blocks.purpose: Practical network boundary notes for customer-facing APIs, agents, tools, and Azure services.

solutions.name: document-ai-portal
solutions.purpose: A customer-facing portal for monitoring and interacting with a Document AI pipeline, featuring OCR extraction and an AI assistant.

inputs.name: document_blob
inputs.description: The source document uploaded by the customer.

inputs.name: customer_id
inputs.description: Identifier for the customer owning the document.

outputs.name: customer_portal_url
outputs.description: The URL of the deployed Static Web App portal.

outputs.name: extracted_data
outputs.description: The structured data extracted from the document.

outputs.name: agent_answer
outputs.description: Response from the pipeline assistant agent.

solutions.name: foundry-agent-basic
solutions.purpose: Minimal reference solution for an Azure AI Foundry Prompt Agent.

solutions.name: foundry-agent-evaluation-observability
solutions.purpose: Reference solution for applying evaluation and observability standards to a Foundry agent while maintaining a customer-safe boundary.

solutions.name: foundry-agent-with-gateway
solutions.purpose: Foundry Prompt Agent using APIM AI Gateway for governed model access.

solutions.name: foundry-agent-with-mcp
solutions.purpose: Reference solution for a Foundry agent using a Model Context Protocol (MCP) tool boundary.

solutions.name: foundry-agent-with-queue-tool
solutions.purpose: Demonstrate a Foundry agent that submits long-running work through a controlled async queue-function boundary.

solutions.name: foundry-agent-with-tools
solutions.purpose: Reference solution for a Foundry agent using a controlled tool boundary.

solutions.name: foundry-devops-agent-basic
solutions.purpose: Minimal reference solution for an Azure AI Foundry agent answering safe pipeline/build status questions through a controlled MCP tool boundary.
